name: Do I need a big website to benefit from Google Assistant optimization?
description: No. Even small businesses can benefit if their pages, local profile, and answers are clear and consistent.

mainEntity.name: Do I need a big website to benefit from Google Assistant optimization?

acceptedAnswer.text: If you already have strong rankings, fast pages, and a well-maintained local profile, optimization may be a quick tune-up rather than a major project. If your content is thin or your business information is inconsistent, you will need more cleanup first.
acceptedAnswer.description: No. Even small businesses can benefit if their pages, local profile, and answers are clear and consistent.
